parts.text: I want to request a Transfer of Responsibility so the billing moves to a new owner.
Please assist me with a Transfer of Responsibility and change the primary name on the account.
I’d like to complete a Transfer of Responsibility because someone else will be the new account holder.
Can you help me with the Transfer of Responsibility process for this account?
I need to start a Transfer of Responsibility to move this account to another person.
I’d like to transfer both the ownership and billing of this account to another user.
I need to update the account name because it’s currently listed under someone else’s name by mistake.
Can you assist with transferring my account to a new primary user?
I’d like to change the account name because I’m
no
longer responsible for this service.
I’d like to remove my name from the account and have it transferred to another person.
Please help me transfer the account ownership from my name to my spouse’s name.
I want to transfer responsibility for this account to a new owner.
I want to change the account ownership because I’m moving the services to another person.
I want to transfer my account under someone else’s name and billing responsibility.
Can you help me transfer the ownership of my account to another person?
I want to separate
one
line and transfer ownership to another person.
Can you help me with splitting billing for my account?
I want to create a new account for one of the lines on my account.
I need assistance separating
one
line from my current account.
I want to set up a separate account for a family member.
I’d like to separate my account and move a line to a new account.
Can you guide me to separate a line from my account?
I want to split my account so that one line belongs to someone else.
How can I separate
one
line from my existing account?
I need separate billing for my account.
I want to set up a separate account for billing purposes.
I’d like to create a separate account for one of my lines.

two
different accounts?
I want to separate a line from my account.
